# LoreAI — AI News & Content Platform
> Your daily AI briefing. Models. Tools. Code. Trends.

LoreAI is a bilingual (English/Chinese) AI news platform providing:
- Daily AI newsletter (Mon-Fri) covering models, apps, developer tools, infrastructure, and open source
- Weekly deep digest (Saturday) with analysis of the week's top stories
- In-depth blog posts on trending AI topics
- SEO reference pages: glossary, FAQ, comparisons, and topic hubs

## Content
- Newsletter: /newsletter
- Blog: /blog
- Glossary: /glossary
- FAQ: /faq
- Comparisons: /compare
- Topic Hubs: /topics

## Chinese versions
- /zh/newsletter
- /zh/blog

## Subscribe
- /subscribe

## Feeds
- /feed.xml (EN)
- /zh/feed.xml (ZH)
